description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [3 sec->1.8 sec] and reduces their Defense Penetration by [250->300] for [10 sec->4 sec].
Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack, Attack Speed by [300->36%], and Physical Defense for [15 sec->6 sec].
Charges forward and deals Physical Damage 12 times to nearby enemies. Cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and the final hit freezes enemies for [4 sec ->2.4 sec].
Every second, Attack increases, Status Resistance by 30, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 1.5%. This effect stacks up to 20 times. At 20 or more stacks, Normal Attack damage increases by 100%.

IV.unified: Draws in nearby enemies while casting.
Status Resistance increases by 30 per stack.

dark.unified: During the duration, Attack Speed is additionally increased by [200->24%].

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [3 sec->2 sec].

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target’s ATK by [20%->25%] and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets' Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by 50%, and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by {0}% for 10 sec.
Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for 2 sec.
